# This file tells Git which files and folders to ignore.

# Unity auto-generated folders (Never upload these)
/[Ll]ibrary/
/[Tt]emp/
/[Oo]bj/
/[Bb]uild/
/[Bb]uilds/
/[Ll]ogs/
/[MemoryCaptures]/
/[UserSettings]/

# Visual Studio / Rider auto-generated project files
# (Unity recreates these automatically when someone opens the project)
*.csproj
*.sln
*.suo
*.tmp
*.user
*.userprefs
*.pidb
*.booproj
*.svclog
*.com.unity.ide.rider/

# OS-specific files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Crash reports
sysinfo.txt

# Builds (Uncomment if you want to ignore actual game builds)
#[Build]/
